query:
SELECT e.id, e.action_id, e.status, e.descricao, e.created_at 
FROM evidences e 
LEFT JOIN actions a ON e.action_id = a.id 
WHERE a.id IS NULL 
ORDER BY e.created_at DESC 
LIMIT 50;
